/****** Script for SelectTopNRows command from SSMS  ******/
"
SELECT distinct
	   FUNC
      ,\"ORDER\"
     ,REFERENCE_COLUMN
      ,VALUE
	 ,TARGET_COLUMN      
    	,IGNORE_BLANKS
      ,REFERENCE_ACTUAL_FIELD
      ,TARGET_ACTUAL_FIELD
	  ,datatype REFCOL_DATA_TYPE
	  ,sequence_order
FROM 
	MDM.datamodel dm 
	inner join
	MDM.job_merging_configuration s on
		DATAMODEL_ID = dm.id
	inner join 
	(		select 	d.id , ma.attributename, ma.datatype 
		from 
			MDM.datamodel d 
			inner join 
			MDM.model m on 
				m.datamodelid =d.stagingdatamodelid	
			inner join
			MDM.modelattributes ma on 
				ma.modelid = m.id
	) ma on 
		ma.id = dm.id and 
		ma.attributename = s.REFERENCE_COLUMN  
	inner join MDM.job_merge_rule mr on
		mr.id = s.rule_id
where 	dm.\"name\" = '"  +  context.Data_Model_Name  + "'  
	and 
	mr.rulename like'"  +  context.Rule_Name   + "%'
order by s.sequence_order
"

"SELECT 
	GID,
	MIN(MDM_ID) AS ROW_ID,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'SOURCE_SYSTEM' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) SOURCE_SYSTEM,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_LABOUR_OFFICE' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) ENTITY_LABOUR_OFFICE,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_CODE' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) AS ENTITY_CODE,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_NAME_ENG' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) ENTITY_NAME_ENG,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_NAME_ARABIC' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) ENTITY_NAME_ARABIC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_LICENSE_NUMBER' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) ENTITY_LICENSE_NUMBER,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_NATIONALITY' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) AS ENTITY_NATIONALITY,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_SECTION' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) AS ENTITY_SECTION,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_EMIRATES' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) AS ENTITY_EMIRATES,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_STATUS' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) AS ENTITY_STATUS,
	MAX(CASE WHEN COLUMN_NAME = 'ENTITY_CLASS' THEN case when COLUMN_VALUE= 'null' then null else COLUMN_VALUE end  else NULL END) AS ENTITY_CLASS,

"
SELECT distinct
	   FUNC
      ,\"ORDER\"
     ,REFERENCE_COLUMN
      ,VALUE
	 ,TARGET_COLUMN      
    	,IGNORE_BLANKS
      ,REFERENCE_ACTUAL_FIELD
      ,TARGET_ACTUAL_FIELD
	  ,datatype REFCOL_DATA_TYPE
	  ,sequence_order
FROM 
	MDM.datamodel dm 
	inner join
	MDM.job_merging_configuration s on
		DATAMODEL_ID = dm.id
	inner join 
	(		select 	d.id , ma.attributename, ma.datatype 
		from 
			MDM.datamodel d 
			inner join 
			MDM.model m on 
				m.datamodelid =d.stagingdatamodelid	
			inner join
			MDM.modelattributes ma on 
				ma.modelid = m.id
	) ma on 
		ma.id = dm.id and 
		ma.attributename = s.REFERENCE_COLUMN  
	inner join MDM.job_merge_rule mr on
		mr.id = s.rule_id
where 	dm.\"name\" = '"  +  context.Data_Model_Name  + "'  
	and 
	mr.rulename like'"  +  context.Rule_Name   + "%'
order by s.sequence_order
"

"

C.\"SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID\",

and b.\"ROW_ID\" = c.\"ROW_ID\"  and C.\"PARENT_COMPANY_ID\" is not null and b.\"GID\" not like 'GR%';
"

"
update staging.\"MDM_ENTITY_AGGREGATE\" MEA
set \"GID\" = A.\"ROW_ID\" , \"MDM_STATUS\" ='Mastered'
from (
select mm.\"ROW_ID\" , SC.SOURCE_ROWID,\"GID\"
from (select REGEXP_SUBSTR(\"ROW_ID\", '[^|]*$') as SOURCE_ROWID,REGEXP_SUBSTR(\"GID\", '[^|]*$') as  MERGED_GID,\"GID\"
from mdm."+context.GroupTable+") SC
join mdm.\"MDM_MASTER_ENTITY\" mm on CAST(mm.\"SOURCE_REC_ID\" as INT) = cast(SC.MERGED_GID as INT))A
where cast(A.SOURCE_ROWID as INT) = MEA.\"ROW_ID\" and A.\"GID\" not like 'GR%'
"

"
update staging.\"MDM_INDIVIDUAL_AGGREGATE\" MEA
set \"GID\" = A.\"ROW_ID\" , \"MDM_STATUS\" ='Mastered'
from (
select mm.\"ROW_ID\" , SC.SOURCE_ROWID,\"GID\"
from (select REGEXP_SUBSTR(\"ROW_ID\", '[^|]*$') as SOURCE_ROWID,REGEXP_SUBSTR(\"GID\", '[^|]*$') as  MERGED_GID,\"GID\"
from mdm."+context.GroupTable+") SC
left join mdm.\"MDM_MASTER_INDIVIDUAL\" mm on CAST(mm.\"SOURCE_REC_ID\" AS INT) = cast(SC.MERGED_GID as INT))A
where cast(A.SOURCE_ROWID as INT) = MEA.\"ROW_ID\"
"
